_comment: Docker Configuration for Eclipse SmartLM - Supports vLLM, SGLang, Ollama, and llama.cpp backends

vllm._comment_timeouts: startup_timeout: seconds to wait for model loading. request_timeout: seconds for generation requests.

sglang._comment: SGLang from LMSYS - Alternative to vLLM with RadixAttention for better throughput
sglang._comment_tp_dp: tp_size: tensor parallelism (multi-GPU split). dp_size: data parallelism (multi-GPU copies)

ollama._comment: Ollama auto-downloads models from registry. Good for Mistral3 GGUF.
ollama._comment_timeouts: startup_timeout: seconds to wait for Ollama ready. pull_timeout: seconds for model pull (30 min default).

llamacpp._comment: llama.cpp server for GGUF models. -1 = all layers on GPU.
llamacpp._comment_timeouts: startup_timeout: seconds to wait for server ready. request_timeout: seconds for generation requests.

docker._comment_quantization: Options: null (auto), 'bitsandbytes', 'awq', 'gptq', 'fp8'. Use for large models.
docker._comment_tensor_parallel: Set to > 1 for multi-GPU. Auto-enabled if model too large for single GPU.
